rows.label: qev040906_MSG0001
rows.name:
Th... the reaction is even bigger
here-mo! Leave it to Muimui-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0003
rows.name:
Th... this is it! I finally found it-mo!
This is truly the legendary sword-mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if it's really the real deal.

rows.label: qev040906_SEL0021
rows.name: Puff out your chest and claim it's mostly thanks to you.

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0004
rows.name:
Look! There is a perfectly strange
pattern standing out on the guard-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0005
rows.name:
Just as Moimoi said... This time it
is absolutely the real thing-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0006
rows.name:
Mooooo! That's wrong-mo! It's also
thanks to Muimui and Moimoi-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0007
rows.name:
Now all we have to do is deliver
this to Officer Walter and
we'll strike it rich-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0008
rows.name:
Heheh, I'll earn a mountain of cash and
eat every last bit of this and that-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040906_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll have Moimoi get the party
ready, so come on! Hurry up
and come back to NLA-mo![ST:wait ]
